info.author: TooTallNate
info.details: This is a port of the original 2048 game (by Gabriele Cirulli) to Nintendo Switch using nx.js.\n\nThe core game logic was able to be used unmodified. The main component of this port is a Canvas-based rendering engine instead of the original DOM-based renderer.

changelog:
v1.2.0
Switch FW v21.x compat

v1.1.0

This version adds joystick control. Thank you @i0x0!

1.0.0

Package updated to use TooTallNate's port.
